notes: Hubtel has no public OpenAPI document. Authored a focused OpenAPI 3.0.3 from Hubtel's Quick Send SMS docs. The adaptor's sendSMS posts to /messages/send (confirmed in dist/index.cjs); request() is a generic passthrough not modeled as a distinct path. Success response shape {Status, MessageId, Rate, NetworkId} taken from Hubtel docs. getMessageStatus added as a plausible companion read endpoint to give a reusable resource shape for seeding.
